sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17610" key="au)toa/nison" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-άνῐσον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n17610.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inequality in the abstract,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg004:809:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">809.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
